basic_details.job_title: IPRCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 15 Manager, Sr. Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Port Rail and Ropeway Corporation (IPRCL)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Port Rail and Ropeway Corporation (IPRCL) Manager, Sr. Manager and More Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 15 vacancies have been announced through the IPRCL Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 63 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Retired officers from Railways, Other Govt. Departments, Central PSUs, Ports, JV Companies under Govt. control with relevant experience in Traffic Planning or Infrastructure Projects
qualification.details: Officers who have taken Voluntary Retirement (VR) or retired on Superannuation from Railways, Other Govt. Departments, Central PSUs, Ports, JV Companies under Govt. control with service experience in Traffic Planning. Officers who have taken Voluntary Retirement (VR) or retired on Superannuation from Railways, Other Govt. Departments, Central PSUs, Ports, JV Companies under Govt. control with service experience in execution of Infrastructure Projects.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IPRCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.iprcl.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IPRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the IPRCL Recruitment 2026 is 24th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IPRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies announced for various posts in the Indian Port Rail and Ropeway Corporation (IPRCL) Recruitment 2026. This includes positions like Manager and Chief General Manager.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IPRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IPRCL Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post or courier.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the IPRCL posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under IPRCL Recruitment 2026 is 63 years. There is no age relaxation mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the IPRCL posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the IPRCL posts ranges from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 2,80,000 per month, depending on the specific post and the candidate's experience and pay scale.

faq.question: Q6. What are the eligibility criteria for IPRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be retired officers from Railways, other Government Departments, Central PSUs, Ports, or JV Companies under Government control with relevant experience in Traffic Planning or Infrastructure Projects.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IPRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for IPRCL Recruitment 2026 involves two stages: screening of applications followed by an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for IPRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IPRCL Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for IPRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for IPRCL Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website of IPRCL. A direct link is usually provided in the "Important Links" section of job notification articles.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IPRCL?
faq.answer: The official website of Indian Port Rail and Ropeway Corporation (IPRCL) is www.iprcl.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.
